title: Misty Valley Farm: Ultimate destination for great food, premium gin
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Misty Valley Farm is the...
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - Misty Valley Farm is the perfect location to spend the day with family and friends, delighting in delicious food, good views and the opportunity to purchase premium gin from the one and only Harmony Distillery.


> Just six kilometres outside of Hartenbos, Misty Valley is the ultimate place to visit for both locals and holidaymakers this festive season.


With Misty Valley now the new site of Harmony Distillery, guests are not only guaranteed delectable dishes from Misty Valley's restaurant, but also an excellent selection of wood-fired pizzas and premium gin from the distillery.

With large, open spaces both inside and outside the restaurant, guests can enjoy the fantastic blend of great flavours and good vibes, come rain or shine.

Whether guests are seated inside or taking in the sunshine outside, the venue offers spectacular views of the surrounding hills, a glistening lake and a clear view of the extensive playing area, equipped with a jumping castle and jungle gym for the children.


> Tender, tasty steaks cooked to your specification, gourmet sandwiches and pastas can be found on Misty Valley Farm's menu; meals which the chefs have perfected. And for those particularly interested in the gin, Harmony Distillery offers gin tasting.


Misty Valley Farm also has its own deli on site, with high-quality meat cuts, frozen meals, rusks, pasta salads and chutneys, much of which are made from ingredients directly from the farm.

Open seven days a week, from 08:00 to 20:00, Misty Valley invites everyone to come and enjoy a day of family fun and making magical memories.

Misty Valley Farm is a cashless facility.

For more information, call Harmony Distillery on 079 895 2394) or Misty Valley Farm on 067 382 5504/ 066 470 4518. You can also visit their Facebook pages, Harmony Distillery and Misty Valley Farm.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
